# takehomepay.nz

> New Zealand salary calculator — compute your take-home pay after PAYE, KiwiSaver, ACC, and student loan.

## Overview

takehomepay.nz is a free online salary calculator for New Zealand. It calculates net take-home pay from gross salary by deducting PAYE income tax, ACC earners' levy, KiwiSaver employee contributions, and student loan repayments. The calculator supports annual, monthly, fortnightly, weekly, and hourly pay periods, and accounts for the latest IRD tax rates and thresholds.

## Main features

- Gross-to-net salary calculator for New Zealand
- PAYE income tax calculation across all tax brackets
- KiwiSaver employee contribution (3%, 4%, 6%, 8%, or 10%)
- ACC earners' levy deduction
- Student loan repayment calculation (12% above threshold)
- Secondary income / secondary tax code support
- Multiple pay period views (annual, monthly, fortnightly, weekly, hourly)

## Data sources

- Inland Revenue (IRD): ird.govt.nz
- PAYE tax rates and thresholds: ird.govt.nz/income-tax
- KiwiSaver contribution rates: ird.govt.nz/kiwisaver
- ACC earners' levy rate: acc.co.nz
- Student loan repayment thresholds: ird.govt.nz/student-loans
